examples: The man did one helluva job.
That's one helluva big house you've got.
It taught me a helluva lot about myself.
Anyway, this player must have one helluva battery if it's supposed to last for an entire crosscountry flight.
"This is a helluva walrus, " says Myhrvold jauntily, trying unsuccessfully to lift the large skull out of its box.
